title: Firrtl fix invalid parameter check in paramod

features.name: parameterized module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with explicit parameter overrides using the #(param_values) syntax

features.name: unpacked array with zero lower bound
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration with a zero lower bound and variable upper bound

features.name: always_comb with blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block using always@(*) with blocking assignments

features.name: clocked always block with for loop and non-blocking assignments
features.description: Code should include a sequential always block with a for loop using non-blocking assignments

features.name: module parameter declaration with integer types
features.description: Code should include a module parameter declaration using integer parameter names without explicit width
